message:
fix: align with sibling repo patterns — validation, streaming, cache eviction

Fixes 10 gaps identified from gitmode/pymode/querymode/drawmode review:

1. Input validation (src/validate.ts): path length (4096), null bytes,
   traversal prevention, workspace ID format, command length, payload size
2. Streaming readFile: new readFileStream() returns R2 body directly for
   large files, exposed via fs/read { stream: true }
3. readdir: replaced LIKE '%' full-descendant scan with two queries —
   direct children + implicit directory detection via SUBSTR/INSTR
4. Cache eviction: LRU eviction when file_cache exceeds 500 entries
5. Terminal buffer rotation: trim to 5000 rows after each write
6. Consistent JSON errors: all error responses are { error: "..." } with
   proper HTTP status codes, including 404 which was plain text
7. Payload size limits: 100MB max enforced at handler boundary
8. Workspace ID validation: regex at handler boundary before DO routing
9. Directory rename: rename() now handles directories (re-prefixes all
   children in both R2 and SQLite index)
10. Client export: nodemode/client entry point with types and validation
    utilities, no dependency on @cloudflare/workers-types
